tasks.subject: Task 1: Create EchelLogo Component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A reusable React component that renders the notebook+pencil logo SVG, adjusting detail level based on size.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/components/EchelLogo.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Renders an SVG notebook with scribble lines and angled pencil
- [ ] Accepts a `size` prop (number, defaults to 24)
- [ ] At size >= 32: three scribbles, pencil with ferrule and gold tip
- [ ] At size < 32: two scribbles, simplified pencil
- [ ] Uses the warm cocoa color palette from the spec

**Verify:** Visual inspection in sidebar and login page after Tasks 2-4

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/EchelLogo.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual inspection", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Renders SVG notebook with scribble lines and angled pencil", "Accepts size prop with responsive detail", "Uses warm cocoa color palette"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Replace Favicon and Page Title
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update the browser tab to show the new logo and name.

**Files:**
- Replace: `frontend/public/favicon.svg`
- Modify: `frontend/index.html:7`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Favicon renders the notebook+pencil icon at 16px
- [ ] Browser tab reads "Echel Planner"

**Verify:** Open the app in a browser, check the tab icon and title

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/public/favicon.svg", "frontend/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "visual inspection", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Favicon renders notebook+pencil icon", "Browser tab reads Echel Planner"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Brand the Sidebar Header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace plain 'Planner' text in sidebar with logo icon + 'Echel Planner'.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx:214-217`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Sidebar header shows 24px logo icon next to "Echel Planner" text
- [ ] Layout is horizontally aligned with a gap between icon and text

**Verify:** Open the app, check the sidebar header visually

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual inspection", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sidebar shows 24px logo + Echel Planner text", "Horizontally aligned with gap"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Brand the Login and Register Pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace generic headings on auth pages with logo + product name + tagline.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.jsx:36-37`
- Modify: `frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.jsx:56-57`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Login page shows: 36px logo + "Echel Planner" heading + tagline in italics
- [ ] Register page shows the same branded header
- [ ] Both pages maintain centered layout

**Verify:** Navigate to `/login` and `/register`, check visually

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual inspection", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Login shows logo + name + tagline", "Register shows logo + name + tagline", "Centered layout maintained"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update E2E Tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix E2E assertions that reference the old heading text.

**Files:**
- Modify: `e2e/tests/auth.spec.ts:30,104`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Login test checks for "Echel Planner" heading
- [ ] Register test checks for "Echel Planner" heading
- [ ] E2E tests pass

**Verify:** `cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/auth.spec.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e/tests/auth.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/auth.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Auth E2E tests pass with new headings"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Visual Spot-Check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify all branded surfaces look correct in the running app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Favicon shows notebook+pencil in browser tab
- [ ] Browser tab title reads "Echel Planner"
- [ ] Sidebar shows logo icon + "Echel Planner"
- [ ] Login page shows logo + name + tagline
- [ ] Register page shows logo + name + tagline
- [ ] No regressions in other pages

**Verify:** Start dev stack, navigate through all surfaces

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && node dev.js start", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All branded surfaces render correctly", "No visual regressions"]}
```
